revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 14 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月14日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 14일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 14 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月十四]][[zh:二月十四]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 14|qq=February 14}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月十四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 14일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 14''' is the 14th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|qid=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} 13rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|741|en|741|qid=Q23597|lt=741|1=741}} {{ill|March 5|en|March 5|qid=Q2392|lt=March 5|1=March 5}}) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|qid=Q349263|lt=Emperor Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}} issued an imperial edict to establish a set of 【国分寺】 and 【国分尼寺】. * {{ill|Shōtai|en|Shōtai|qid=Q1324780|lt=Shōtai|1=Shōtai}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|899|en|899|qid=Q23734|lt=899|1=899}} {{ill|March 29|en|March 29|qid=Q2459|lt=March 29|1=March 29}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Tokihira|en|Fujiwara no Tokihira|qid=Q2994735|lt=Fujiwara Tokihira|1=Fujiwara no Tokihira}} was appointed as {{ill|Minister of the Left|en|Minister of the Left|qid=Q949008|lt=Minister of the Left|1=Minister of the Left}}, while {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|en|Sugawara no Michizane|qid=Q382005|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} was appointed as {{ill|Minister of the Right|en|Minister of the Right|qid=Q1351174|lt=Udaijin|1=Minister of the Right}}. * {{ill|Tengyō|en|Tengyō|qid=Q1327340|lt=Tenkei|1=Tengyō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|940|en|940|qid=Q23830|lt=940|1=940}} {{ill|March 25|en|March 25|qid=Q2454|lt=March 25|1=March 25}}) – {{ill|Taira no Masakado|1=Taira no Masakado|2=en|3=Taira no Masakado|4=ja|5=平将門|6=de|7=Taira no Masakado|8=es|9=Taira no Masakado|10=fr|11=Taira no Masakado|lt=Taira no Masakado|qid=Q1207652|en|Taira no Masakado|1=Taira no Masakado|2=en|3=Taira no Masakado|4=ja|5=平将門|6=de|7=Taira no Masakado|8=es|9=Taira no Masakado|10=fr|11=Taira no Masakado|lt=Taira no Masakado|qid=Q1207652|qid=Q1207652|lt=Taira no Masakado}}, who had established his supremacy in eastern Japan and declared himself a new emperor, clashed with the forces led by {{ill|Taira no Sadamori|en|Taira no Sadamori|qid=Q3514057|lt=Taira no Sadamori|1=Taira no Sadamori}} and {{ill|Fujiwara no Hidesato|en|Fujiwara no Hidesato|qid=Q1136623|lt=Fujiwara no Hidesato|1=Fujiwara no Hidesato}}; he was struck by a stray arrow at Sarushima in Shimōsa Province and died. * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|qid=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei|1=Bun'ei}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1274|en|1274|qid=Q5527|lt=1274|1=1274}} {{ill|March 23|en|March 23|qid=Q2445|lt=March 23|1=March 23}}) – {{ill|Nichiren|1=Nichiren|2=ja|3=日蓮|4=ko|5=니치렌|6=de|7=Nichiren|8=es|9=Nichiren|10=fr|11=Nichiren|12=it|13=Nichiren|14=nl|15=Nichiren|16=no|17=Nichiren|lt=Nichiren|qid=Q311478en|Nichiren|1=Nichiren|2=ja|3=日蓮|4=ko|5=니치렌|6=de|7=Nichiren|8=es|9=Nichiren|10=fr|11=Nichiren|12=it|13=Nichiren|14=nl|15=Nichiren|16=no|17=Nichiren|lt=Nichiren|qid=Q311478qid=Q311478|lt=Nichiren}}, who had been exiled to Sado, was pardoned by the bakufu and allowed to return to Kamakura. * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1633|en|1633|qid=Q6870|lt=1633|1=1633}} {{ill|March 23|en|March 23|qid=Q2445|lt=March 23|1=March 23}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} banned the return to Japan of its citizens who had traveled overseas and lived abroad for extended periods, except for those aboard the {{ill|Hōsho-sen|ja|奉書船|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōsho-sen|1=hōsho-sen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11445513}}. == Births == * {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki|1=Hōreki}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1751|en|1751|qid=Q7615|lt=1751|1=1751}} {{ill|March 11|en|March 11|qid=Q2398|lt=March 11|1=March 11}}) – {{ill|Matsudaira Harusato|en|Matsudaira Harusato|qid=Q11530504|lt=Matsudaira Harugō|1=Matsudaira Harusato}} (also known as Nichikan), a monk (died {{ill|1818|en|1818|qid=Q6964|lt=1818|1=1818}}). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1850|en|1850|qid=Q7653|lt=1850|1=1850}} {{ill|March 27|en|March 27|qid=Q2457|lt=March 27|1=March 27}}) – {{ill|Kiyoura Keigo|en|Kiyoura Keigo|qid=Q381739|lt=Kiyora Kiyamitsu|1=Kiyoura Keigo}}, who became the 23rd Prime Minister of Japan (died {{ill|1942|en|1942|qid=Q18625|lt=1942|1=1942}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|March 19|en|March 19|qid=Q2424|lt=March 19|1=March 19}}) – {{ill|Sakichi Toyoda|en|Sakichi Toyoda|qid=Q137727|lt=Toyota Sakichi|1=Sakichi Toyoda}}, a businessman and the founder of Toyota (died {{ill|1930|en|1930|qid=Q18787|lt=1930|1=1930}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tengyō|en|Tengyō|qid=Q1327340|lt=Tenkei|1=Tengyō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|940|en|940|qid=Q23830|lt=940|1=940}} {{ill|March 25|en|March 25|qid=Q2454|lt=March 25|1=March 25}}) – {{ill|Taira no Masakado|1=Taira no Masakado|2=en|3=Taira no Masakado|4=ja|5=平将門|6=de|7=Taira no Masakado|8=es|9=Taira no Masakado|10=fr|11=Taira no Masakado|lt=Taira no Masakado|qid=Q1207652|en|Taira no Masakado|1=Taira no Masakado|2=en|3=Taira no Masakado|4=ja|5=平将門|6=de|7=Taira no Masakado|8=es|9=Taira no Masakado|10=fr|11=Taira no Masakado|lt=Taira no Masakado|qid=Q1207652|qid=Q1207652|lt=Taira no Masakado}}, a military commander ({{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}}). * {{ill|Meiwa|en|Meiwa|qid=Q1146161|lt=Meiwa|1=Meiwa}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1766|en|1766|qid=Q7669|lt=1766|1=1766}} {{ill|March 24|en|March 24|qid=Q2453|lt=March 24|1=March 24}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munemoto|en|Tokugawa Munemoto|qid=Q843627|lt=Tokugawa Sōkan|1=Tokugawa Munemoto}}, the 5th head of the {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|qid=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain|1=Mito Domain}} (born {{ill|1728|en|1728|qid=Q6947|lt=1728|1=1728}}). * {{ill|An'ei|en|An'ei|qid=Q1193910|lt=An'ei|1=An'ei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1775|en|1775|qid=Q7700|lt=1775|1=1775}} {{ill|March 15|en|March 15|qid=Q2403|lt=March 15|1=March 15}}) – {{ill|Shakagake Un'emon|ja|釋迦ヶ嶽雲右エ門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakagake Un'emon|1=Shakagatake Kumoemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17213935}}, a former sumo wrestler and the 36th Ōzeki (born {{ill|1749|en|1749|qid=Q7607|lt=1749|1=1749}}). * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|qid=Q1373146|lt=Bunka|1=Bunka}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1809|en|1809|qid=Q6919|lt=1809|1=1809}} {{ill|March 29|en|March 29|qid=Q2459|lt=March 29|1=March 29}}) – {{ill|Mōri Narihira|ja|毛利斉房|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Narihira|1=Mōri Narifusa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11547649}}, the head of the {{ill|Chōshū Domain|en|Chōshū Domain|qid=Q876267|lt=Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain}} (born {{ill|1782|en|1782|qid=Q7740|lt=1782|1=1782}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|13|2|15|1|14|3|2|0214|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 2월 14일]] [[ja:2月14日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月十四]]
